name: AI Translator
description: AI-powered subtitle translation using DeepSeek, OpenAI, or Ollama. Translates SRT, VTT, and ASS subtitle formats to any language.
overview: Translate subtitles automatically using AI services like DeepSeek, OpenAI, or local Ollama models. Batch processing with configurable batch sizes. Supports SRT, WebVTT, and ASS subtitle formats.

versions.changelog: Initial release: AI-powered subtitle translation with DeepSeek, OpenAI, and Ollama support. Configurable batch size, model selection, and target language.
